mapper.select: SELECT schema_name, table_name, avg_table_size as value, status FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY avg_table_size DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT schema_name, table_name, (total_seq_scan + total_idx_scan) as value, status FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY (total_seq_scan + total_idx_scan) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT schema_name, table_name, avg_bloat_percent as value, status FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY avg_bloat_percent DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) as timestamp, SUM(total_seq_scan) as seq_scan, SUM(total_idx_scan) as idx_scan, SUM(total_tup_ins) as n_tup_ins, SUM(total_tup_upd) as n_tup_upd, SUM(total_tup_del) as n_tup_del FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) as timestamp, AVG(avg_cache_hit_ratio) as cache_hit_ratio FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT table_name, avg_bloat_percent as bloat_percent FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY avg_bloat_percent DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT table_name, vacuum_delay_seconds FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY vacuum_delay_seconds DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tables, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '정상' THEN 1 END) as active_tables, AVG(avg_cache_hit_ratio) as avg_cache_hit_ratio, SUM(total_seq_scan) as total_seq_scans, SUM(total_idx_scan) as total_idx_scans, COUNT(CASE WHEN avg_bloat_percent >= 15 THEN 1 END) as high_bloat_tables FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} )
